title: Gamerule Menu InGame
description: Allows you to change gamerule in game with menu.
body:
**The mod allows you to change gamerule in game with menu**

---------

<center>


![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85e641835fc9eff1450de0a1c3ba814d0db05c98.png)

![ps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)

### Gamerule Menu

**you can change the gamerule in the game without cheating with gamerule menu.**

![gemrul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdbc02d381491c4ded414a1433a5f6162a9c689b.jpeg)

![ps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)

### Keybind 

**key to open Gamerule Menu InGame, default key "G".**

![toggle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d97c059ca594a26f991c7617eb7d2e78a104ef.jpeg)

</center>
